essence.subtitle: The Essence
essence.title: Chef Ramos fuses ocean freshness with the sophistication of haute cuisine.
essence.description: The sea breeze meets culinary excellence.

items.name: The Infinite Terrace
items.description: Outdoor lunches, surrounded by a magical Caribbean atmosphere.

items.name: VIP Lounge
items.description: Enclosed space, equipped with a private bathroom and internal bar. Ideal for business meetings.

items.name: Restaurant
items.description: More private, classic, and elegant room, overlooking the hotel pool and with a capacity for 50 people.

menu.subtitle: Menu
menu.title: Gastro-Boutique
menu.description: A sensory experience divided into three pillars of excellence.

items.name: Octopus Tiradito
items.description: Thinly sliced octopus on eggplant cream mirror, drizzled with chimichurri, cherry tomatoes, radish sprouts, and plantain chips.

items.name: Bahian Salad
items.description: Baby lettuce mix with balsamic reduction and sesame, topped with crispy seafood, fuji and eel sauces, avocado, cucumber, and tomato.

items.name: Grilled Octopus
items.description: Seared with paprika, green curry pesto, eel sauce, and bacon croutons.

items.name: Salmon in Lemon Cream
items.description: Accompanied by sautéed vegetables.

items.name: Pepper Tenderloin
items.description: Center of tenderloin in three peppers with rustic basil mashed potatoes, wine cream, and pistachio praline.

items.name: Chicken Filet Mignon
items.description: Wrapped in bacon with roquefort and rosemary sauce.

items.name: SEVEN RISOTTO
items.description: Creamy risotto with three cheeses, topped with tenderloin escalopes with sun-dried tomatoes, arugula, classic pesto, Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese curls, almonds, and balsamic reduction.

items.name: Linguine Frutti di Mare
items.description: In red seafood sauce flavored with sambuca.

items.name: Seven Burger
items.description: Prepared meat, mozzarella, parmesan, and caramelized onion.

items.name: Seven Panini
items.description: With Spanish chorizo, salami, pepperoni, and Serrano ham.

items.name: Tronchatoro Cake
items.description: Our famous moist chocolate cake with layers of artisan fudge.

items.name: New York Cheesecake
items.description: Classic New York style, dense and creamy with a hint of vanilla.

items.name: Capuccino
items.description: Perfect balance between espresso, steamed milk, and foam.

items.name: Vanilla Latte
items.description: Smooth espresso with creamy milk and a touch of French vanilla.

items.name: Mocaccino
items.description: Fusion of premium chocolate, espresso, and steamed milk.

items.name: Americano
items.description: Espresso diluted in hot water for a clean and prolonged flavor.

items.name: Pistachio
items.description: Made with selected pistachios for an authentic flavor.

items.name: Ferrero Rocher
items.description: Premium product combining creamy hazelnut gelato with hazelnut and cocoa ripples, covered in a crunchy milk chocolate layer.

items.name: Vainilla Borbone
items.description: Premium vanilla with floral notes and extreme creaminess.

items.name: Gianduia (Vegan)
items.description: Italian classic, artisanal ice cream, dairy-free and animal-derivative-free, intensely combining chocolate and hazelnut paste.

items.name: Blueberry Cheesecake (Sugar-Free)
items.description: All the cheesecake flavor with fresh blueberries, no added sugar.

footer.description: An ode to the sea and haute cuisine. Experience coastal luxury at its finest.
footer.closed: Open every day by the navigation canal
footer.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to make a reservation at Esencia Boutique.
